questions.question: Consider a minimum distance classifier with a prototype set { (0,0), (1,1), (2,2) } and a training set containing the following images: {(0,0), (1,0), (2,0)}, {(0,1), (1,1), (2,1)}, {(0,2), (1,2), (2,2)}. Find the class label for the input image (1,1).

A minimum distance classifier is trained on a dataset of 2D images with 3 classes. The prototype set is { (0,0), (1,1), (2,2) } and the training set contains 10 images. Calculate the probability of the input image (2,2) belonging to each class.

Consider a minimum distance classifier with a prototype set { (0,0), (0,1), (0,2) } and a training set containing the following images: {(0,0), (0,1), (0,2)}, {(1,0), (1,1), (1,2)}, {(2,0), (2,1), (2,2)}. Find the class label for the input image (1,1) and explain why.
